name: snackbar
description: Bottom snackbar notifications with optional action via useSnackbar hook.

props.name: children
props.description: App content wrapped by the provider; snackbars render above it via a portal

props.name: defaultPosition
props.description: Default screen edge where snackbars appear when no per-call position is specified

examples.code:
// Default position overridden to top globally
<SnackbarProvider defaultPosition="top">
  <App />
</SnackbarProvider>
